series_metadata.series_title: Audit Report on Cambridge Adjustments; Fee Entry
series_metadata.series_description: The Audit Report on Cambridge Adjustments; Fee Entry is the supervisor’s weekly audit of subordinate work for Cambridge Adjustments, suspense worked in Medical Invoice Information System (MIIS), and for fee bill entry in Medical Invoice Information System (MIIS) or Cambridge. The Cambridge Adjustments are adjustment requests submitted by the Managed Care Organizations (MCO) to adjust previously paid invoices in the Cambridge billing system.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office or internal audit review is completed ; Electronic: in office or internal audit review is completed
